note: Implemented flag toggle UI across the app: (1) Added flaggedIdsProvider as reactive AsyncNotifier wrapping FlagStore with toggle method; (2) EventCard now accepts onToggleFlag callback showing tappable flag icon in time row; (3) HomeScreen watches flaggedIdsProvider, passes flag state/toggle to cards, added AppBar filter toggle for flagged-only view with empty state; (4) EventDetailScreen converted from StatefulWidget to ConsumerWidget using Riverpod for flag state; (5) Updated flag_toggle_test.dart to use ProviderScope with in-memory FlagStore override.
